 ?: help  │  1-3: tabs  │  tab/shift+tab: panels  │  c: compose  │  S: settings  │  U: unread  │  r: all  │  R: sender
 f: forward  │  D: delete  │  a: archive  │  V: range  │  *: star  │  l/right/]: preview  │  h/left/[: folders
